overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a red coat approaching and entering a cozy stone cottage at night. The scene transitions from an outdoor rural setting with lantern-lit paths to a warm, firelit interior with rustic wooden furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural cottage approach path at night

events.description: character opens wooden door and enters the cottage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the stone cottage entrance

entered.detail: rustic stone cottage with thatched roof and glowing windows
tall wooden post with lit lantern illuminating the path
unpaved trail leading to the cottage door
large stone structure visible on the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path toward a stone cottage at night. The scene is illuminated by lantern posts along the path and warm light from the cottage windows, with a distant castle visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy cottage living room with dining area and fireplace

events.description: transition from cool outdoor twilight to warm firelit interior
character slows and turns to examine the fireplace and seating area

agents.ego_description: exploring the cottage interior, walking around the dining table and approaching the fireplace

entered.detail: large stone hearth with active fire and cooking pot
long table with checkered tablecloth set with plates and glasses
upholstered seating with checkered pattern near the fireplace
tall bookcase filled with books against the stone wall
wooden bed with draped curtains in the corner

segments.scene_description: Inside the cottage, the character explores a warm, firelit living space with a large dining table, comfortable seating by the stone fireplace, and wooden furnishings. The room features stone walls, wooden floors, and a cozy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cool, moonlit rural path into the warm, glowing sanctuary of a stone cottage. It begins by following a character in a red coat along a dirt path illuminated by lantern posts, with a distant castle silhouetted against the night horizon. As the character approaches the building, the camera glides through the doorway, shifting the atmosphere from the open night air to a cozy, enclosed interior. The scene then expands to reveal a firelit living space where the cool exterior tones are replaced by the golden light of a stone fireplace. Finally, the camera explores the rustic room, moving past a large dining table and wooden furnishings across the polished floors.
